name: NextMove
description: Installable Career Intelligence Skill for structured resume analysis, improvement, job matching, career advice, and complete career analysis.

capability_descriptions.analyze_resume: Analyze resume strengths, weaknesses, skills, and career level.
capability_descriptions.improve_resume: Generate resume issues, suggestions, and section improvements.
capability_descriptions.match_job: Compare a resume with a job description and identify fit and gaps.
capability_descriptions.career_advice: Generate career paths, skill gaps, and recommended next actions.
capability_descriptions.career_analysis: Run all four capabilities in fixed order and return one structured report.

resume.description: Raw resume text or a structured ResumeProfile when called from Python.
